data.title: Hindustan Zinc Reports Record Q1 Net Profit of US$ 578 Million, Up 145% YoY; Highest-Ever EBITDA Driven by Strong Production and Lowest Cost of Production
data.description: In Udaipur, India, Hindustan Zinc Limited, the top integrated zinc and silver producers globally, started FY27 with a record-breaking first-quarter performance.

data.title: Meta Launches Seller App For Facebook Marketplace. EBay Stock Falls.
data.description: Following the announcement of Meta's plan to introduce a Seller app for Facebook Marketplace, Meta stock experienced a slight decrease in value, while eBay stock saw a more significant decline. This news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: SpaceX Delays Starship Test Flight Due To Weather. Stock Continues To Slide.
data.description: SpaceX has postponed the test launch of its Starship for the second occasion. The company's stock has been experiencing a decline since its initial public offering, with shares dropping by approximately 1% on Friday. The delay was attributed to weather conditions.

data.title: Oracle Stock Gets Much-Needed Boost From Pentagon Software Deal
data.description: The value of Oracle's stock witnessed a rise following the enterprise technology firm securing a lucrative software contract with the Pentagon. This deal provided a significant boost to Oracle's stock performance, marking a positive development for the company.

data.title: The Value Of Trust Is Enormous — But Takes Time To Appear
data.description: The importance of trust cannot be underestimated, as it is vital for ensuring success in any endeavor. Building trust may seem intangible initially, but its impact becomes significantly tangible over time. This underscores the enormous value that trust holds in various aspects of life and business.

data.title: Is SpaceX Stake Google's Artificial Intelligence Piggy Bank?
data.description: Alphabet's investment in Elon Musk's SpaceX poses a significant challenge for Google's stock. The question arises whether Google will offload its SpaceX holdings to fuel its rising expenditure on artificial intelligence (AI). This dilemma raises concerns about whether SpaceX is considered Google's primary source for AI investment.

data.title: Verizon Earnings Beat But Revenue Light Amid Lower Phone Upgrades
data.description: In the second quarter, Verizon exceeded earnings expectations. They also acquired more "postpaid" phone subscribers than anticipated. However, their revenue did not meet projections. Despite this, the company demonstrated a strong performance with increased numbers of new subscribers and beat earnings estimates for the quarter.

data.title: Quantum-safe Bitcoin roadmap could lead to significant price gains, says expert Charles Edwards.
data.description: Charles Edwards predicts that implementing a Bitcoin development plan to tackle risks posed by quantum computing could result in a rapid price surge by a significant percentage.

data.title: LHV Group's own share acquisition transactions
data.description: During the week of July 17-23, 2026, LHV Group disclosed the acquisition of its own shares on the Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange. The group purchased a significant number of shares during this period.

data.title: China uses rare earth leverage by restricting exports to 14 cutting-edge European companies in chemicals processing, electric motors, and defense.
data.description: Shipments of essential supplies have been prohibited by Beijing to 14 companies excelling in the fields of chemicals processing, electric motors, and defense.

data.title: Bank of Oak Ridge Appoints Paul Fedorkowicz to Board of Directors
data.description: Oak Ridge Financial Services, Inc. appointed Paul Fedorkowicz to its Board of Directors on July 24, 2026. Oak Ridge, the parent company of Bank of Oak Ridge, made this announcement. Mr. Fedorkowicz, with over 30 years of experience in executive leadership, has expertise in public accounting, finance, audit, corporate governance, and business operations. The company's stock trades under the ticker symbol OTCPink: BKOR.

data.title: Honeywell Technologies Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, Honeywell Technologies (NASDAQ: HON) revealed that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly dividend of $0.70 per share for its common stock. The dividend will be distributed on September 4, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the market's close on August 14, 2026. Honeywell Technologies is a leading automation firm known for its global presence and continuous innovation in addressing critical world challenges.

data.title: Factorial receives its initial commercial aerospace order for advanced battery cells.
data.description: In recent reports, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate has reached 6.2%, which is lower than the previous month's rate of 6.5%. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the past month. These numbers indicate a positive trend in the job market, showing signs of recovery and growth. As the economy continues to navigate through the challenges brought about by the pandemic, this increase in job creation and decrease in unemployment rate offer a glimpse of hope for the future.

data.title: In HelloNation, Pool & Landscaping Expert Tina Possehn Wolbers Discusses What Pool Opening & Closing Services Include
data.description: A report discusses the benefits of seasonal pool service in Lansing, Michigan. It emphasizes how this service streamlines pool maintenance and safeguards backyard pools throughout the year. The article delves into what is encompassed in pool opening and closing services and how they aid in maintaining pools. The focus is on providing a comprehensive understanding of how these services cater to pool owners in ensuring the upkeep and longevity of their swimming pools.
